ops.title: 2026-07-17 fleet .mcp.json cc-guides rollout — semble de-exposed for real; codex-edits-Claude-ships rule, detach+waiter wrapper protocol, render --force for unmanaged JSON, roster-diff lesson
ops.body:
2026-07-17: `.mcp.json` became a cc-guides artifact fleet-wide (cc-skills `f9623cef`: mcp-base/mcp-swift guides + repo-bootstrap layout FileSpecs, plugin 0.55.0; 38 repos wired/shipped/green; closing record cc-notes note 63667cd). Deferred busy-tree remainder (cookie-sync, write-like-me, yasyf.com) in cc-notes task 27c8cc0; SKILL.md prose deferral in 2763e90. The prior "semble removed everywhere 2026-07-14" memory was an overclaim — corrected in all 17 account copies.

**Why:** the Jun 20 template fix reached only new scaffolds and the Jul 14 session cleaned only the 3 repos its own bounded AskUserQuestion offered ("remove everywhere" answered a 3-repo menu); nothing managed `.mcp.json`, so 24 repos drifted invisibly for 3+ weeks.

**How to apply:**
- **codex edits, Claude ships**: codex `workspace-write` sandbox denies every `.git` write (objects, index.lock, packed-refs, refs/jj — even `jj log` when it lazily imports refs). Keep VCS mutations outside codex; the 39-lane fan-out lost every ship to this before the native-sonnet recovery sweep.
- Hand-rolled codex wrappers must `setsid`-detach the codex process and wait via ONE background until-loop notification — schema-bound subagents get force-concluded after enough poll turns, and their reaping kills foreground children mid-task.
- First render of a pre-existing unmanaged JSON artifact needs `cc-guides render --force`: JSON managed-ness is lock-derived (`v3Overwritable`, cc-guides render.go), not marker-derived like md/sh.
- A recovery/retry contract roster must be diffed against the original roster — semisweet silently fell out of the 39→39 rebuild and only an independent lock sweep caught it. Same class: my `"$dAGENTS.md"` sh-variable parsing bug silently skipped every rendered artifact until the cross-check exposed it. Cross-verify exhaustive enumerations, always ([[workflow-script-interpolation]], [[cc-guides-fragment-pipeline]]).
- Semble grep gates need word-boundary tolerance (ensemble/assemble/resemble) and one sanctioned survivor: the ccx catalog line "(semantic, semble-backed)".
